title: anotis nummulariiformis
intro: Anotis nummulariiformis is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and roots of Anotis nummulariiformis are used to make herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, offering health benefits such as pain relief and wound healing. In traditional medicine, Anotis nummulariiformis is also used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
